sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْمُبَكِّرُ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِرَاحَةِ الْعَقْلِ وَالْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Rano spavanje je neophodno za odmor uma i tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Early sleep is necessary for the rest of the mind and body.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْأَطْفَالُ إِلَى تِسْعِ سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ النَّوْمِ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ تَقْرِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Djeca trebaju oko devet sati sna svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Children need about nine hours of sleep every night.

sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْجَيِّدُ يُسَاعِدُ عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ أَثْنَاءَ الدِّرَاسَةِ وَالْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Dobar san pomaže u koncentraciji tokom učenja i rada.
sentences.translationEn: Good sleep helps with concentration during study and work.
